mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.parent_id, d.manager, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees e WHERE e.dept_id = d.id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL ), 0) AS member_count, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.deleted_at FROM departments d WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(d.parent_id, 0), d.id

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.parent_id, d.manager, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees e WHERE e.dept_id = d.id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL ), 0) AS member_count, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.deleted_at FROM departments d WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM departments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE departments SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
